textByHash.02b51af43cc82349a0ff39e403f3d44c00d5669a: The Moons of Peril rage against their bindings. Holding them back is exhausting. Please bring me the moonlight grub paste from elsewhere in Neypotzli.
textByHash.037606adf5172bb85c3f6a468b5588ea5a135646: The masters were always secretive, especially towards the end. They rarely spoke of the world outside this place, but when they did, they only spoke of pain.
textByHash.0545bf6f4dbc20e8e4de7b8ed7c4aec00983e4d6: The Moons of Peril rage against their bindings. Holding them back is exhausting. Please bring me the moss lizard tail and moonlight grub paste from elsewhere in Neypotzli
textByHash.05da4e22bb537ca4ea9e4e1dfca207b12226a67f: This word... Mokhaiotl... I only heard it once, when things neared the end. It was not clear to me what it was, but when they spoke of it... it was the first time I'd heard them speak with hope.
textByHash.061cf97ab5ade98123f09d8a125b761012a2134e: Thank you, iknil. The Blood Moon of Peril is sufficiently distracted. You should now proceed on to the next one.
textByHash.06a13a725ace1c3ac95fdafaafa6b041f7d063d3: The ritual is in motion, but the wound to the seal will not close with the Moons still raging against it. I must ask you for one more small favour.
textByHash.084afe96392b4c084fa6a79c755a607e09005e2f: The days of the masters are fresh memories to me, but to you, one who is so short lived, they are days of myth...
textByHash.0cb70370f0b5cfea2081a056994431048ff31c7b: I have more in common with them than I do with most of your kind, iknil. Think of me as you do them.
textByHash.0d7837a30746fda39bac84fedf1037659b09bbb7: Does the stream tire of eroding the earth? Does the earth tire of forming the mountain?
textByHash.0ed60c4cb45553e65a6143d95c7e1bad11625a64: I am a nagua of earth and stream. Being close to both empowers me to do my task.
textByHash.12087a671e2b59fbab6e194c9105ee09dd132264: Just as being far from moonlight weakens the Moons of Peril.
textByHash.17ba522bb5568613316887151dde1574a26c693e: Yes, but the danger remains. There is another keystone here. An earlier form of the icosahedron from when Neypotzli was being built.
textByHash.1ae6ed6d610332f0f440432ec13b4a17391568ac: Be prepared to fight without your weapon. Ensure the room's braziers remain lit, for the cold will restore the Moon's strength.
textByHash.1b55b8c45d4bc0ed73389eba2a4b86016a766ecd: Her fellows disagreed with her actions. They created this prison, and they summoned me to watch over it.
textByHash.1e60ce971dae09c1d7866d212db7a8a9470b4ffb: Naguanil is the magic of nature. A ritual involving the living parts of this place could re-infuse the icosahedron.
textByHash.255c68290c329209fb58b011631d0a27d36fb667: A human? Interesting... In that case, allow me to use a language more familiar to you.
textByHash.287a8a01a237ad351e45e2c99f816b542756a349: It is not a problem, iknil.
textByHash.2e16fa324a879258aeee5834408f0862fa273340: For now though, thank you for your help, iknil.
textByHash.2f123885ea7261d93782f9903ec1234d4e3be293: I see... The masters always hoped that humans and dwarves would be their inheritors. Mokhaiotl must have been part of that. To hear that it never came to be is... unfortunate.
textByHash.32b34224a7e55fffa83c2a5faa4364513ba0ea6b: If your hope is that I can tell you about a whole race, then I am likely to disappoint you, iknil. The masters were secretive individuals. They rarely divulged information that I did not require.
textByHash.3d2e6e4c47be4385ccce553d3add9bed298cca5e: Thank you, iknil. The Blue Moon of Peril is sufficiently distracted. You should now proceed on to the next one.
textByHash.3e5b8bd8e86de3ae7bed5ff3f41283badbbb17a3: Now, I must return to my focus on the Moons of Peril. Seek me out in the chamber to the south east if you need my guidance. Go with haste, iknil. Good luck.
textByHash.4197a17bb9e8996099691401a38f6fef1a1ad8cf: I was just... Processing. I suppose I could allow you another chance to obtain a piece of equipment, but it won't be guaranteed.
textByHash.43039240245861905e7ee380102b998567ecd0d8: The Moons cannot be killed, but they can be distracted whilst I repair the seal. Enter their chambers here in Neypotzli and engage them in combat.
textByHash.4308766aa3f9a2a045ed12f90b226cca1ef09782: They can be fished in the north east section of Neypotzli.
textByHash.437fedb50994d32373a6b7f222e71c63f9e76b03: I am Eyatlalli, a nagua of-
textByHash.4a00f5e6e5802d35e26a0770ea1159997ddfdfd3: Ensure it doesn't catch you with your back turned. Make sure to take cover when it fires its searing hot rays.
textByHash.4c4c005bd1904bd7c440cb915757a4586dc7eca0: Old One? A curious term. We nagua measure time as the rivers change their paths and as the mountains errode away.
textByHash.52ed41b52a3a3ebf100b3445d63f3281a618fe63: Yes. Humans and dwarves were recent arrivals here, but the masters saw you as inheritors. I believe in some ways, you offered them hope in a time filled with pain.
textByHash.53970c4bb5eaa3668c5930e7ef513b435bb94188: Tell me, why do the interlopers seek the magic of the masters?
textByHash.53c84ee399cd8aa86e48a5afd7d67cab74d40f00: It is a prison. Everything around us serves that purpose.
textByHash.54bf48d42b15eac57fcc2c579d4d035ff3c60985: Thank you, iknil. The Eclipse Moon of Peril is sufficiently distracted. You should now proceed on to the next one.
textByHash.54f44106b966f2098690bc31f2d71a8410ffbc4d: They were kind, but filled with sadness. As you know, they summoned me after another of their kind unleashed the Moons of Peril.
textByHash.576300f2295268a34f3096a760eefb42363a70c8: Thank you, iknil. The Moons are sufficiently distracted. Return to me for your reward.
textByHash.59a189ae04be51a20ea84b7aff0d5ae4926fc715: Very well. Come and claim your rewards from the chamber to the south east. Should you aid in containing them again, you can return there to receive more rewards.
textByHash.6245b67c293863747091180063a37a6fd99fb9f7: For the Moons of Peril, and their long dead summoner.
textByHash.631e009eb561770dd64a57f4596b3879559b5b25: Place the scales in the shape of the sun at high noon.
textByHash.649f1ae2006b463135179a3bf716f81a632b5bdd: Now carve the earth in two with the paste, as the stream carves the earth.
textByHash.66119f972a611635ff98a2fd681e765e2adf0675: Thank you, iknil. The Moons are sufficiently distracted. You should now return to me.
textByHash.6ab8b3bad533542c9614323be2fd3a21e6dc43a6: Do not apologise, iknil. You still have a chance to stop them.
textByHash.6f5183d599d716da7ea84dce63e47fc133dc48bb: I can give you a fragment of the icosahedron. It resonates with the magic of the other keystone. It will guide you to it. Go to the keystone, and you will no doubt find the interlopers.
textByHash.7037d96fa96cb55cefdbb6a9897436003eef0145: It is key to the magics that keep the Moons of Peril contained. It reshapes and reweaves the magical seals as the Moons attempt to break them.
textByHash.72ecddbdee334036fa112ed59972ded1b7c1e4e8: It resonates with the magic of the other keystone. It will guide you to it. You must go there and find the interlopers. They must be removed from Neypotzli.
textByHash.73b2c524f544f4aaba5f52eea44b989cd2decb27: That is good to hear. The Moons of Peril already pose so great a threat. Neypotzli does not need any more dangers.
textByHash.7bcdfc1bd2158a38b75a86d868d8630d39050755: However, the Moons of Peril must remain my priority. I cannot stop the interlopers from trying to obtain it.
textByHash.82b7fed34a3a94d404601fe4962d3b7834fac3c4: Yes. Powerful and terrible nagua summoned to wreak havoc.
textByHash.854a360d87971c37c43a6e94836453f4a4faf7b7: They can be picked off of the saplings growing all around the north of Neypotzli.
textByHash.86f5429ce904aa1ff69b9ddc0917c0561faab688: They can be caught in the north west section of Neypotzli. They'll likely be hiding in the bushes.
textByHash.8dd09d202b80ce863c3d2df98c91e66c13ee6ef0: When it starts to rain blood, look to your feet. When the jaguars are summoned, prepare to leap back.
textByHash.8e3cfa5b70dacd8f24a2dc1e672f60583a318515: My masters, however, felt differently. They fought for a world that was no longer their own. They believed in preserving these lands for those who would inhabit them afterwards.
textByHash.914298a08203ad6aa6f575715537e00cde1665a0: The Moons of Peril rage against their bindings. Holding them back is exhausting. Please bring me the bream scales, moss lizard tail and moonlight grub paste from elsewhere in Neypotzli.
textByHash.928c6a37746cbb31336470cd6f888c2e1eec26c0: Icosahedron. An object of twenty facets, floating at the centre of this room.
textByHash.95b7c36a2613865b6870643def68156a1800bcd0: Congratulations, iknil. Enjoy your new equipment.
textByHash.9617ae47c776d5e7b690e824fa68b135c7a69f39: It is alright, iknil. Time is like a river. You can try to change the current, but in the end, it always reaches the sea. Some things are simply not meant to be.
textByHash.9a3e7005190ca1b93e2ffc4a16d55e092b25a5aa: So they now have the keystone? The magic of the masters is not for them.
textByHash.9c060269131f5a3aadc18c3295df79bb9d2e613b: Here. This is what to look for.
textByHash.a0f6144a8c0796d8e86f36c99303e823fc879ae2: Yes, I suspected that to be the case. Your arrival was too precise to be coincidence. Tell me, what do the interlopers seek?
textByHash.a6017ae00699fe72c61008291f6b59232ac76758: Welcome back, iknil. You have timed your arrival here well, for Neypotzli is in danger once more. There are interlopers present who have little regard for the dangers posed by the Moons of Peril.
textByHash.aaada803a16c0cf40808f6f3fcaa22066a779290: You're certain, Iknil? You could end up with nothing.
textByHash.ac73f8529cfb932ceffb86f089618ab0a492cd46: Welcome back, iknil. Were you able to deal with those interlopers?
textByHash.be7bad8cdefd0e8ed8e3b41406fffb83ce781bb8: Any time the Moons of Peril inflict pain, they can heal themselves, freeze your joints, or blind your eyes. A defensive approach should be used against them.
textByHash.bedc82a1db578c770ac5f19577aecc4396949432: What do you wish to know?
textByHash.c742ceb95755159d1ae2ec00c1f5c2c676bc987f: Thank you, iknil. I shall use it to reinforce the seal.
textByHash.c940dedbc25468c9e531d9f901fefe0a3655e717: I am Eyatlalli, a nagua of earth and streams.
textByHash.c9caf8467302194c713732cd0ab86b9b81bc7ba3: All I can tell you about are the three individuals that I knew personally.
textByHash.cb64f4ac3a15fd799425e81d5559e5aa8a7759e6: Thank you, iknil. Eclipse Moon of Peril is sufficiently distracted. You should now proceed on to the next one.
textByHash.d168c911158fda1baad8b29b02b367bba16b49ed: Ordinarily, no. Their mere presence is enough to bring most creatures to an early death. However, you have my help.
textByHash.d23c74dc71114f5ff1334292c2c57d6fde0adb55: They had already lost so much by the time they summoned me. Their extinction was already guaranteed, yet they kept going all the same.
textByHash.db8b0ed0f96d1f30f4b7aa49d585def6a6e5061e: For centuries, the magic used to seal the Moons has been woven into Neypotzli and the creatures that inhabit it.
textByHash.dc7d7ae7ed6a68d783b433ae3402d7bffd9cc502: It was a dark time. Their people had suffered great calamity years earlier and their extinction was inevitable.
textByHash.e495418d8e78d8a1c053146687646b34a4d6e631: Place the lizard tail beneath it as the earth.
textByHash.e72bc6438dc07e178e253cde3187a8aa19c37ec2: You could. Distracting them again will afford me some rest. In return, I am willing to repay you with trinkets from ancient times.
textByHash.edfaf9a67cbe5dbdefe870d93026af9efcdbd733: Old One? A curious term. We nagua measure time as the rivers change their paths and as the mountains erode away.
textByHash.efa0d1f798038e49ce9e3922fdd2372033c86cff: Congratulations on your reward, iknil. That is a treasure from ages past.
textByHash.f0fa320abfaaeb841366be27bf188de5af169d60: You have done well. The seal is repaired, but the Moons have seen a glimpse of freedom. Even now they rage against their bindings. It is... taxing.
textByHash.f124ff85cdebf546a8bcc6594c6e9b358364b3e8: Whilst you fight them, look for my glyphs. They will protect and guide you. If the Moons become too enraged, I will transport you out of their chambers.
textByHash.f2f69430e131b8aa8ac978ec865705736ceb7645: Provided they have the aptitude, I suspect their beliefs are correct.
textByHash.f3b6355889d0d137be58f10aeb312c7e6599bab4: In the face of inevitable death, a powerful shaman decided to lash out and inflict death on others.
textByHash.f503d0489d2e6aebac1fba19b75cb4f0c4afd095: Now, let us speak of something else.
textByHash.f5ce11988b1ceeb2d7ad4f5db2981ef703672626: It seems that many, such as the shaman who summoned the Moons, felt that the only salvation left was destruction.
textByHash.f71545f90a839125e7c56c80b88bf971a9954708: The icosahedron behind me is a form of keystone, and the interlopers have already tried to tamper with it.
textByHash.f98dd066c12820b445f6e4e409ecea4c8d90fed8: Yes. Bring me scales of a bream, the tail of a moss lizard and paste made of moonlight grubs. I will begin preparing the rest of the ritual.
textByHash.fa7987bf496b6344eeec3a442cb855aa764bcad8: For it to have moved means that the seals must have needed reshaping. That has not happened for decades.
textByHash.fca451f13602db71bcd8387b0bf1eb12e8532c94: So it seems. You're welcome to try again.
